translated: [CORNER: Opening Skit] Mei-chan, you've really become reliable lately.
Yes.
It seems my sister trusts Mei-senpai quite a bit as well.
Na-Natsumi does?
It really doesn't look that way, though.
Yeah, yeah.
I feel like Mei-chan naturally leads all the 1st and 2nd years,
or gives them a push when they need it.
Just as Kanon-senpai says, Mei-senpai takes the initiative to keep everyone together.
Well, that's...
If I don't do it, everyone just does whatever they want,
so I don't really have a choice.
It's impressive that you can step up without hesitating like that.
If it were me, I'd just leave the leading to Chi-chan or Ren-chan.
Mei-senpai was also very reliable when we were heading to Music World.
Oh, I heard about that from Margarete-chan.
You did a great job, Mei-chan.
Back then, I just thought I wanted to be a bit more like Chisato-senpai.
Well,
looking back now, I think I was a bit too tense.
I think that's perfectly fine.
Seeing Mei-senpai work hard has the benefit of making Liella more positive.
I totally get it!
It makes us feel like we can't afford to lose either.
Eh?
You and the others, Kanon-senpai?
No, no, no way.
There's no way you seniors would lose to someone like me.
Don't say that, Mei-chan.
You just said "someone like me," didn't you?
You have more power to move those around you than you realize.
Plus, you have the kindness to support others.
Yes.
Margarete says that often too.
"I can't afford to lose to Mei-senpai."
Or so she says.
I can definitely imagine her saying that.
By the way, your Margarete impression is spot on, Tomari.
I'm flattered.
Anyway, Mei-chan, you're the driving force of Liella,
so I'm counting on you from now on.
Driving force?
Well, that might be a bit of an exaggeration...
But fine, if it's just lighting a fire under the engine, I'll do it anytime.
That's very reassuring.
In that case, please go ahead and light a fire under my sister's motivation for the next exams.
Oh,
that sounds good.
Then light a fire under my baking, too!
Don't get carried away, you two!
I can't look after you that much!
Love Live! Superstar!! Yuigaoka Girls' High School Broadcasting Station: Lieraji - Tomari, Kanon, and Mei!
[CORNER: Self-Introductions] Hello,
everyone!
I'm Date Sayuri, the voice of Kanon Shibuya.
